---
modified_at: 2026-05-14
cssclasses:
  - no-embed-padding
---
```dataviewjs
(async () => {
    // ── Debounce / lock guard ───────────────────────────────────────────
    const activeFile = app.workspace.getActiveFile();
    if (!activeFile) { dv.paragraph('⚠️ Cannot detect file'); return; }
    const lockKey = 'plumbob-cal-' + activeFile.path;
    if (window[lockKey + '_running']) return;
    if (window[lockKey + '_timeout']) clearTimeout(window[lockKey + '_timeout']);
    await new Promise(r => { window[lockKey + '_timeout'] = setTimeout(r, 500); });
    window[lockKey + '_running'] = true;

try {
    // ── Parse YYYY-MM ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const m = activeFile.basename.match(/^(\d{4})-(\d{2})$/);
    if (!m) { dv.paragraph('⚠️ Filename must be YYYY-MM'); return; }
    const year  = parseInt(m[1]);
    const month = parseInt(m[2]);
    const MONTH_YEAR = m[1] + '-' + m[2];
    const DIARY_FOLDER = '日记/' + year;

    // ── Light/dark mode ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const pg = dv.page(activeFile.path);
    const lightMode = pg?.plumbob_light === true;
    const modeClass = lightMode ? 'plumbob-cal light' : 'plumbob-cal dark';

    // ── Season ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const SEASONS = [
        { months:[11,0,1], name:'Winter', char:'❄' },
        { months:[2,3,4],  name:'Spring', char:'✿' },
        { months:[5,6,7],  name:'Summer', char:'✦' },
        { months:[8,9,10], name:'Autumn', char:'✾' },
    ];
    const season = SEASONS.find(s => s.months.includes(month - 1));

    // ── Moon phases (Sims illustrated icons, 60×60 PNG) ─────────────────────
    // ── Moon phases (Sims illustrated icons, 60×60 PNG) ─────────────────────
    // ── Moon phases (Sims illustrated icons, 60×60 PNG) ─────────────────────
    const MOON_IMGS = [
        "",
        "",
        "",
        "",
        "",
        "",
        "",
        ""
    ];
    function jd(y,mo,d){const a=Math.floor((14-mo)/12),yr=y+4800-a,mn=mo+12*a-3;return d+Math.floor((153*mn+2)/5)+365*yr+Math.floor(yr/4)-Math.floor(yr/100)+Math.floor(yr/400)-32045;}
    function moonPhase(y,mo,d){
        const diff=((jd(y,mo,d)-jd(2025,1,29))%29.53+29.53)%29.53;
        const idx=Math.round(diff/(29.53/8))%8;
        return `<div class="pc-moon-img" style="width:22px;height:22px;background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,${MOON_IMGS[idx]}');background-size:contain;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:center;flex-shrink:0;"></div>`;
    }
    function isoWeek(y,mo,d){const dt=new Date(Date.UTC(y,mo-1,d)),dn=dt.getUTCDay()||7;dt.setUTCDate(dt.getUTCDate()+4-dn);return Math.ceil((((dt-new Date(Date.UTC(dt.getUTCFullYear(),0,1)))/86400000)+1)/7);}
    function isoYW(y,mo,d){const dt=new Date(Date.UTC(y,mo-1,d)),dn=dt.getUTCDay()||7;dt.setUTCDate(dt.getUTCDate()+4-dn);const wy=dt.getUTCFullYear();return{y:wy,w:Math.ceil((((dt-new Date(Date.UTC(wy,0,1)))/86400000)+1)/7)};}

    // ── Holidays ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const HOLIDAYS = {
        '0-1':"New Year's",'1-14':"Valentine's",'3-17':"St Patrick's",
        '4-25':"Memorial Day",'5-19':"Juneteenth",'6-4':"Independence",
        '8-7':"Labor Day",'9-31':"Halloween",'10-27':"Thanksgiving",
        '11-25':"Christmas",
    };

    // ── Activity definitions ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    // Only activities that actually appear in 2026-04 daily notes.
    const ACTIVITIES = [
        { key:'juti',       color:'#50e131', label:'举铁',
          check: f => f.activity_weights === true },
        { key:'wangqiu',    color:'#a8d840', label:'网球',
          check: f => f.activity_tennis === true || f.activity_squash === true },
        { key:'jianshenf',  color:'#3fb820', label:'健身房',
          check: f => { const t=f.activity_tags; return t&&(Array.isArray(t)?t.some(x=>String(x).includes('健身房')):String(t).includes('健身房')); } },
        { key:'youyong',    color:'#33bcc1', label:'游泳',
          check: f => f.activity_swimming === true },
        { key:'changge',    color:'#ee5da5', label:'唱歌',
          check: f => f.activity_singing === true },
        { key:'therapy',    color:'#816dcc', label:'Therapy',
          check: f => { const t=f.activity_tags; return t&&(Array.isArray(t)?t.some(x=>String(x).includes('therapy')):String(t).includes('therapy')); } },
        { key:'kandianshi', color:'#df841c', label:'看戏',
          check: f => { const t=f.activity_tags; return t&&(Array.isArray(t)?t.some(x=>String(x).includes('看戏')):String(t).includes('看戏')); } },
        { key:'chuqu',      color:'#448cc8', label:'出去玩',
          check: f => { const t=f.activity_tags; return t&&(Array.isArray(t)?t.some(x=>String(x).includes('出去玩')):String(t).includes('出去玩')); } },
        { key:'fangjia',    color:'#9dc948', label:'放假',
          check: f => { const t=f.activity_tags; return (t&&(Array.isArray(t)?t.some(x=>String(x).includes('放假')):String(t).includes('放假')))||f.pto===true; } },
        { key:'kandaifu',  color:'#7fc8dc', label:'看医生',
          check: f => { const t=f.medical_tags; return t&&(Array.isArray(t)?t.length>0:!!t); } },
        { key:'maomao',    color:'#f48fb1', label:'毛毛',
          check: f => { const t=f.activity_tags; return t&&(Array.isArray(t)?t.some(x=>String(x).includes('毛毛')):String(t).includes('毛毛')); } },
        { key:'kecheng',    color:'#e1c043', label:'学习',
          check: f => { const t=f.activity_tags; return t&&(Array.isArray(t)?t.some(x=>String(x).includes('学习')):String(t).includes('学习')); } },
    ];

    // ── Compressed 60×60 PNG images (base64, background-image approach) ─
    // Only 4 activities have Sims reference images; others show SVG badge only.
    const ICON_B64 = {
        juti:       "",
        youyong:    "",
        kandianshi: "",
        changge:    "",
        fangjia:    "",
        kandaifu:   "",
        therapy:    "",
        chuqu:      "",
        maomao:     "",
    };

    // ── Small single-color badge SVGs (17×17, single color) ────────────────
    const SV = {
        juti:       _c=>`<img src="data:image/png;base64," width="17" height="17" style="object-fit:contain;">`,
        youyong:    _c=>`<img src="data:image/png;base64," width="17" height="17" style="object-fit:contain;">`,
        changge:    c=>`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17"><ellipse cx="12" cy="8.5" rx="4.5" ry="5.5" fill="${c}"/><rect x="11" y="13.5" width="2" height="5.5" rx="1" fill="${c}"/><rect x="7.5" y="19" width="9" height="2" rx="1" fill="${c}"/></svg>`,
        therapy:    _c=>`<img src="data:image/png;base64," width="17" height="17" style="object-fit:contain;">`,
        kandianshi: c=>`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="13" rx="2.5" fill="${c}"/><rect x="4.5" y="9" width="12" height="8" rx="1" fill="rgba(0,0,0,0.4)"/><line x1="8" y1="20" x2="14" y2="20" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="8" y1="7" x2="5.5" y2="3.5" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="13" y1="7" x2="15.5" y2="3.5" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>`,
        chuqu:      _c=>`<img src="data:image/png;base64," width="17" height="17" style="object-fit:contain;">`,
        wangqiu:     _c=>`<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:17px;height:17px;border-radius:28%;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#a8d840,#446010);flex-shrink:0;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M6 6Q12 12 6 18"/><path d="M18 6Q12 12 18 18"/></svg></span>`,
        jianshenf:  _c=>`<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:17px;height:17px;border-radius:28%;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#50e131,#236a10);flex-shrink:0;"><svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="9" width="3" height="6" rx="1.5"/><rect x="5" y="7" width="2" height="10" rx="1"/><line x1="7" y1="12" x2="17" y2="12"/><rect x="17" y="7" width="2" height="10" rx="1"/><rect x="19" y="9" width="3" height="6" rx="1.5"/></svg></span>`,
        fangjia:    c=>`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17"><ellipse cx="12" cy="18.5" rx="7" ry="2.8" fill="${c}" opacity="0.5"/><rect x="11.3" y="8" width="1.4" height="10" rx="0.7" fill="${c}"/><path d="M12 8 Q8 4 5 6 Q8 5 12 10z" fill="${c}" opacity="0.9"/><path d="M12 8 Q16 4 19 6 Q16 5 12 10z" fill="${c}" opacity="0.9"/><path d="M12 10 Q9 7 7 9 Q9 7 12 12z" fill="${c}" opacity="0.65"/><ellipse cx="9.5" cy="18" rx="1.3" ry="1" fill="${c}"/></svg>`,
        kandaifu:   _c=>`<img src="data:image/png;base64," width="17" height="17" style="object-fit:contain;">`,
        maomao:     _c=>`<img src="data:image/png;base64," width="17" height="17" style="object-fit:contain;">`,
        kecheng:    c=>`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="17" height="17"><path d="M4 4h7v16c-2-1-4.5-1.5-7-1V4z" fill="${c}" opacity="0.9"/><path d="M20 4h-7v16c2-1 4.5-1.5 7-1V4z" fill="${c}" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="11.5" y1="4" x2="11.5" y2="19.5" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M6.5 4v5.5l1.75-1.6L10 9.5V4z" fill="#e84033" opacity="0.85"/></svg>`,
    };

    // ── Inject CSS (remove+recreate pattern) ────────────────────────────
    const STYLE_ID = 'plumbob-calendar-injected';
    const old = document.getElementById(STYLE_ID);
    if (old) old.remove();
    const styleEl = document.createElement('style');
    styleEl.id = STYLE_ID;
    styleEl.textContent = `
.plumbob-cal { width:100%; font-family:system-ui,sans-serif; box-sizing:border-box; }
.plumbob-cal.dark {
  --pc-ha:#50e131; --pc-txt:#f2fbff; --pc-yr:#7fc8dc;
  --pc-sea:rgba(127,200,220,0.85); --pc-sea-b:rgba(127,200,220,0.35);
  --pc-dow:#7fc8dc; --pc-dow-we:#ee5da5;
  --pc-cell:rgba(7,30,46,0.18); --pc-cell-lite:rgba(7,30,46,0.06); --pc-cell-b:rgba(127,200,220,0.09);
  --pc-cell-we:rgba(46,10,10,0.22); --pc-cell-we-lite:rgba(46,10,10,0.12);
  --pc-cell-we-past:rgba(238,93,165,0.16); --pc-cell-we-past-lite:rgba(238,93,165,0.09);
  --pc-other:rgba(3,14,22,0.55); --pc-other-b:rgba(127,200,220,0.03);
  --pc-tod-b:#50e131; --pc-tod-bg:rgba(80,225,49,0.06);
  --pc-tod-nb:#50e131; --pc-tod-nt:#030e16;
  --pc-we:#ee5da5; --pc-num:#f2fbff;
  --pc-hol-bg:rgba(225,192,67,0.07); --pc-hol-b:rgba(225,192,67,0.2);
  --pc-hol-tag:#e1c043;
  --pc-wm:.04; --pc-wn:#7fc8dc;
  --pc-leg:rgba(3,14,22,0.55); --pc-leg-b:rgba(127,200,220,0.06); --pc-leg-t:rgba(205,229,239,0.8);
}
.plumbob-cal.light {
  --pc-ha:#3fb820; --pc-txt:#1a2a35; --pc-yr:#094a63;
  --pc-sea:#094a63; --pc-sea-b:rgba(6,55,73,0.35);
  --pc-dow:#094a63; --pc-dow-we:#c03882;
  --pc-cell:rgba(127,200,220,0.07); --pc-cell-lite:rgba(127,200,220,0.02); --pc-cell-b:rgba(6,55,73,0.1);
  --pc-cell-we:rgba(110,18,18,0.12); --pc-cell-we-lite:rgba(110,18,18,0.06);
  --pc-cell-we-past:rgba(192,56,130,0.10); --pc-cell-we-past-lite:rgba(192,56,130,0.05);
  --pc-other:rgba(6,55,73,0.12); --pc-other-b:rgba(6,55,73,0.04);
  --pc-tod-b:#3fb820; --pc-tod-bg:rgba(63,184,32,0.08);
  --pc-tod-nb:#3fb820; --pc-tod-nt:#fff;
  --pc-we:#c03882; --pc-num:#0a1a25;
  --pc-hol-bg:rgba(225,192,67,0.12); --pc-hol-b:rgba(200,170,0,0.28);
  --pc-hol-tag:rgba(160,120,0,0.75);
  --pc-wm:.06; --pc-wn:#094a63;
  --pc-leg:rgba(6,55,73,0.05); --pc-leg-b:rgba(6,55,73,0.1); --pc-leg-t:rgba(6,55,73,0.85);
}
/* Header */
.plumbob-cal .pc-hdr {
  display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:8px;
  padding:0 2px 10px; border-bottom:2px solid var(--pc-ha); margin-bottom:6px;
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-month { font-size:30px; font-weight:700; color:#e1c043; font-family:Figtree,var(--font-interface),sans-serif; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-year  { font-size:17px; color:var(--pc-yr); }
.plumbob-cal .pc-hsp   { flex:1; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-sbadge {
  font-size:13px; letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; font-weight:600;
  color:#c8a020; padding:3px 10px;
  border:1px solid rgba(200,160,32,0.5); border-radius:10px;
  background:rgba(238,93,165,0.18);
}
/* DoW row */
.plumbob-cal .pc-drow {
  display:grid; grid-template-columns:26px repeat(7,1fr); gap:3px; margin-bottom:4px;
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-d {
  text-align:center; padding:7px 0; font-size:11px; font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--pc-dow);
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-d.we { color:var(--pc-dow-we); }
/* Grid */
.plumbob-cal .pc-grid {
  display:grid; grid-template-columns:26px repeat(7,1fr); gap:3px;
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-wn {
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  font-size:9px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
/* Day cell */
.plumbob-cal .pc-day {
  position:relative; min-height:155px;
  background:var(--pc-cell); border:1px solid var(--pc-cell-b);
  border-radius:5px; padding:5px 6px 5px;
  display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; overflow:hidden;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.other  { background:var(--pc-other); border-color:var(--pc-other-b); opacity:.45; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.has-note { background:var(--pc-cell-lite); }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.no-note  { background:var(--pc-cell); }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.we-day.no-note  { background:var(--pc-cell-we); }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.we-day.has-note { background:var(--pc-cell-we-lite); }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.we-past.no-note  { background:var(--pc-cell-we-past); }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.we-past.has-note { background:var(--pc-cell-we-past-lite); }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.today  { box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 2.5px var(--pc-tod-b); background:var(--pc-tod-bg); border-color:transparent; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.hol    { background:var(--pc-hol-bg); border-color:var(--pc-hol-b); }
/* Top row */
.plumbob-cal .pc-top   { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; flex-shrink:0; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-num   { font-size:15px; font-weight:500; color:var(--pc-num); flex-shrink:0; line-height:1; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-num.we  { color:var(--pc-we); }
.plumbob-cal .pc-day.today .pc-num {
  width:24px; height:24px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--pc-tod-nb); color:var(--pc-tod-nt);
  font-weight:700; font-size:12px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-htag {
  flex:1; font-size:8px; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--pc-hol-tag);
  overflow:hidden; white-space:nowrap; text-overflow:ellipsis;
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-moon  { margin-left:auto; flex-shrink:0; display:flex; align-items:center; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-moon-img { width:22px; height:22px; object-fit:contain; }
/* Middle: solo illustration */
.plumbob-cal .pc-mid   { flex:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; min-height:0; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-icon  {
  width:60px; height:60px; flex-shrink:0;
  background-size:contain; background-repeat:no-repeat; background-position:center;
}
/* Badges */
.plumbob-cal .pc-badges { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:3px; flex-shrink:0; padding-top:2px; margin-top:auto; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-badge  {
  width:22px; height:22px; border-radius:4px;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0; overflow:hidden;
}
/* Legend */
.plumbob-cal .pc-legend {
  display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; gap:5px 12px;
  margin-top:10px; padding:7px 10px;
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-le { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; font-size:10px; color:#1a2a35; }
.plumbob-cal .pc-lt {
  width:16px; height:16px; border-radius:3px;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; overflow:hidden; flex-shrink:0;
}
.plumbob-cal .pc-ld { width:1px; height:12px; background:var(--pc-leg-b); }
`;
    document.head.appendChild(styleEl);

    // ── Collect daily note activity data ────────────────────────────────
    const files = dv.pages('"' + DIARY_FOLDER + '"')
        .where(p => p?.file?.day?.toFormat?.('yyyy-MM') === MONTH_YEAR);

    const dailyActs  = {};
    const dailyLeave = {};
    for (const f of files) {
        if (!f?.file?.day) continue;
        const date = f.file.day.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd');
        dailyActs[date] = new Set();
        for (const act of ACTIVITIES) {
            try { if (act.check(f)) dailyActs[date].add(act.key); }
            catch(e) {}
        }
        try {
            const jq = f.假期;
            if (jq) {
                const tags = Array.isArray(jq) ? jq.map(String) : [String(jq)];
                if (tags.some(t => t === '放假/病假'))     dailyLeave[date] = 'sick';
                if (tags.some(t => t === '放假/PTO'))     dailyLeave[date] = 'pto';
            }
        } catch(e) {}
    }

    // ── Calendar constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month, 0).getDate();
    const firstDow    = new Date(year, month - 1, 1).getDay();
    const today       = new Date();
    const todayStr    = `${today.getFullYear()}-${String(today.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(today.getDate()).padStart(2,'0')}`;
    const DOW         = ['Sun','Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri','Sat'];
    const MNAMES      = ['January','February','March','April','May','June','July','August','September','October','November','December'];
    const vaultName   = app.vault.getName();

    // ── Build HTML ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    const h = [];
    h.push(`<div class="${modeClass}">`);

    // Header
    h.push(`<div class="pc-hdr">
      <span class="pc-month">${MNAMES[month-1]}</span>
      <span class="pc-year">${year}</span>
      <span class="pc-hsp"></span>
      <span class="pc-sbadge">${season.char} ${season.name}</span>
    </div>`);

    // DoW
    h.push('<div class="pc-drow">');
    h.push('<div class="pc-wn"></div>');
    DOW.forEach((d,i) => {
        h.push(`<div class="pc-d${(i===0||i===6)?' we':''}">${d}</div>`);
    });
    h.push('</div>');

    // Grid
    h.push('<div class="pc-grid">');

    function wnLink(yw) {
        const ws     = String(yw.w).padStart(2,'0');
        const path   = '周计划/'+yw.y+'/'+yw.y+'-W'+ws+'.md';
        const exists = !!app.vault.getAbstractFileByPath(path);
        const col    = exists ? '#0e5f7c' : '#3d8fa8';
        const f      = encodeURIComponent(path.slice(0,-3));
        return `<a href="obsidian://open?vault=${encodeURIComponent(vaultName)}&file=${f}" class="pc-wn" style="text-decoration:none;color:${col};">W${ws}</a>`;
    }

    if (firstDow > 0) {
        // Standalone WN div before filler cells
        h.push(wnLink(isoYW(year,month,2-firstDow)));
        for (let i=0; i<firstDow; i++)
            h.push('<div class="pc-day other"></div>');
    }

    for (let day=1; day<=daysInMonth; day++) {
        const date    = `${year}-${String(month).padStart(2,'0')}-${String(day).padStart(2,'0')}`;
        const dow     = new Date(year, month-1, day).getDay();
        const isToday = date === todayStr;
        const isWE    = dow===0||dow===6;
        const holiday = HOLIDAYS[`${month-1}-${day}`] || null;
        const noteActs = dailyActs[date] ? [...dailyActs[date]] : [];
        // Priority: swim+gym together → show swim illustration
        const isSolo  = noteActs.length === 1;
        const soloKey = isSolo ? noteActs[0]
                      : (noteActs.includes('youyong') && (noteActs.includes('juti')||noteActs.includes('jianshenf')||noteActs.includes('wangqiu')))   ? 'youyong'
                      : (noteActs.includes('maomao')  && noteActs.includes('chuqu'))  ? 'maomao'
                      : null;
        const hasNote = !!dailyActs[date];

        const weClass = isWE ? (date < todayStr ? 'we-past' : 'we-day') : '';
        const cls = ['pc-day', isToday?'today':'', weClass, holiday?'hol':'', hasNote?'has-note':'no-note'].filter(Boolean).join(' ');

        // WN must be a grid sibling BEFORE the day cell opens
        if (dow === 0) h.push(wnLink(isoYW(year,month,day+1)));
        h.push(`<div class="${cls}">`);

        // Top row
        const numCls = 'pc-num' + (isWE&&!isToday?' we':'');
        const htag   = holiday ? `<span class="pc-htag">${holiday}</span>` : '<span class="pc-hsp"></span>';
        const dayEl  = hasNote
            ? `<a href="obsidian://open?vault=${encodeURIComponent(vaultName)}&file=${encodeURIComponent(date)}" class="${numCls}" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit;">${day}</a>`
            : `<span class="${numCls}">${day}</span>`;
        const leaveType = dailyLeave[date];
        const leaveIcon = leaveType === 'sick'
            ? `<div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,');background-size:contain;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:center;"></div>`
            : leaveType === 'pto' && ICON_B64.fangjia
            ? `<div style="width:22px;height:22px;flex-shrink:0;background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,${ICON_B64.fangjia}');background-size:contain;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:center;"></div>`
            : '';
        h.push(`<div class="pc-top">${dayEl}${htag}${leaveIcon}<span class="pc-moon">${moonPhase(year,month,day)}</span></div>`);

        // Middle: solo illustration (background-image, base64 PNG, no img src)
        h.push('<div class="pc-mid">');
        if (soloKey && ICON_B64[soloKey]) {
            const bgUrl = 'data:image/png;base64,' + ICON_B64[soloKey];
            h.push(`<div class="pc-icon" style="background-image:url('${bgUrl}');"></div>`);
        }
        h.push('</div>');

        // Badge row
        if (noteActs.length > 0) {
            h.push('<div class="pc-badges">');
            for (const key of noteActs) {
                const act = ACTIVITIES.find(a=>a.key===key);
                if (!act) continue;
                if (ICON_B64[key]) {
                    h.push(`<div class="pc-badge" style="background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,${ICON_B64[key]}');background-size:contain;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:center;"></div>`);
                } else {
                    h.push(`<div class="pc-badge" style="background:${act.color}28;">${SV[key](act.color)}</div>`);
                }
            }
            h.push('</div>');
        }
        h.push('</div>');
    }

    const trail = (7 - ((firstDow + daysInMonth) % 7)) % 7;
    for (let i=0; i<trail; i++) h.push('<div class="pc-day other"></div>');
    h.push('</div>'); // pc-grid

    // Legend
    h.push('<div class="pc-legend">');
    ACTIVITIES.forEach((act, i) => {
        if (i > 0) h.push('<div class="pc-ld"></div>');
        const legIcon = ICON_B64[act.key]
            ? `<div class="pc-lt" style="background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,${ICON_B64[act.key]}');background-size:contain;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:center;"></div>`
            : `<div class="pc-lt" style="background:${act.color}28;">${SV[act.key](act.color)}</div>`;
        h.push(`<div class="pc-le">${legIcon}${act.label}</div>`);
    });
    h.push('</div>');

    h.push('</div>'); // plumbob-cal

    // Render via DOM (bypasses markdown escaping)
    const container = dv.el('div', '');
    container.style.cssText = 'width:100%;display:block;overflow:visible;';
    container.innerHTML = h.join('');

} catch(err) {
    console.error('PlumbobCal:', err);
    dv.paragraph('⚠️ Calendar error: ' + err.message);
} finally {
    window[lockKey + '_running'] = false;
}
})();
```
